mapper.sql: id, user_id, admin_id, title, content, action_url, read_status, read_at, status, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: select from `user_inbox_message` where user_id = #{userId} and status = 1 order by read_status asc, created_at desc, id desc
select count(1) from `user_inbox_message` where user_id = #{userId} and status = 1 and read_status = 0
select from `user_inbox_message` where user_id = #{userId} and status = 1 and read_status = 0 order by created_at desc, id desc limit 1
mapper.update: update `user_inbox_message` set read_status = 1, read_at = #{readAt}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId} and status = 1 and read_status = 0
update `user_inbox_message` set read_status = 1, read_at = #{readAt}, updated_at = now() where user_id = #{userId} and status = 1 and read_status = 0
